recommendations.title: A Walk in the Woods
recommendations.overview: After spending two decades in England, Bill Bryson returns to the U.S., where he decides the best way to connect with his homeland is to hike the Appalachian Trail with one of his oldest friends.

recommendations.title: Big Miracle
recommendations.overview: A small-town news reporter and a Greenpeace volunteer enlist the help of rival superpowers to save three majestic gray whales trapped under the ice of the Arctic Circle.

recommendations.title: He Said, She Said

recommendations.title: The Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants

recommendations.title: License to Wed

recommendations.title: Dunston Checks In
recommendations.overview: Hotel manager Robert Grant is forced by his boss to postpone his family vacation when a hotel critic checks in. Trouble is, the critic is really a villainous jewel thief with an orangutan assistant named Dunston. When Dunston gets loose and tries to

recommendations.title: He's Just Not That Into You
recommendations.overview: Have you ever wondered why they said they would call but didn't, or why they don't want to sleep with you anymore, or why your relationship isn't going to the next level? Maybe they're just not that into you. Gigi wants a man who says he'll call her

recommendations.title: The Terminal
recommendations.overview: An Eastern European tourist unexpectedly finds himself stranded in JFK airport, and must take up temporary residence there.

recommendations.title: Donald Trump's The Art of the Deal: The Movie

recommendations.title: The Immigrant
recommendations.overview: A European immigrant endures a challenging voyage only to get into trouble as soon as he arrives in New York.
